title: Delta live table
description: Schema for the Delta live table configuration

name.description: The name of the delta live table job.

maxWorkers.description: The maximum number of workers to be used. Defaults to (<number of jobs> - 1)

jobs.description: A list of jobs to execute in the delta live table.

outputTableName.description: The name of the output table.

viewName.description: The name of the view. (Can be found in the hive metastore)

indexes.description: A list of clustering indexes to apply. (Typically used for lookup properties like Facility and Project)
